overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a gold convertible driving through Night City's rain-soaked downtown streets at night. The vehicle navigates through moderate traffic and neon-lit intersections, showcasing futuristic urban architecture with towering holographic advertisements and wet reflective asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane highway underpass with commercial advertising

events.description: oncoming vehicle passes in the opposite lane on the left side
slight acceleration as traffic ahead begins to clear

agents.ego_description: driving steadily under the elevated highway, following a line of traffic in the right lane while maintaining consistent speed

notable_agents.action: red sedan driving ahead in the same lane with brake lights illuminated

entered.detail: elevated highway overpass creating a canopy over the road with concrete support columns
large illuminated advertisement featuring a character with green neon accents mounted on the left wall
tall futuristic buildings with illuminated windows lining the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a steady drive under a massive concrete overpass in a futuristic city. The gold convertible follows traffic through the sheltered multi-lane highway, passing beneath a green neon billboard on the left while glass office towers rise on the right. The wet asphalt reflects the ambient neon lighting as the vehicle maintains a consistent speed behind a red sedan.

scene_state.functional_zone: open downtown boulevard with towering digital advertisements and holographic displays

events.description: vehicle accelerates rapidly and initiates a drift maneuver around a corner
camera swings to dramatic side view to showcase the car drifting on wet pavement
overtakes a white limousine and other traffic while drifting through the turn

agents.ego_description: accelerating aggressively and drifting around corners, overtaking slower vehicles with dramatic camera angles showcasing the vehicle's handling

notable_agents.action: white limousine being overtaken on the left side during the drift
red sports car driving ahead in the distance

entered.detail: massive buildings covered in bright neon advertisements and holographic displays towering over the street
large cable-stayed bridge structure visible in the distance between the city buildings
building facade covered in multiple large video screens showing various advertisements

segments.scene_description: Exiting the overpass, the scene opens into a wide downtown boulevard lined with towering neon skyscrapers. The gold convertible accelerates aggressively and drifts around a corner, with the camera swinging to a dramatic side view that showcases the wet pavement reflections. The vehicle overtakes a white limousine while massive digital billboards and a distant suspension bridge tower dominate the skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown intersection with elevated walkways and dense commercial signage

events.description: approaches intersection and stops at red traffic light before proceeding
turns right at the intersection and accelerates through the crosswalk
passes under a pedestrian overpass with traditional Japanese architectural elements visible ahead

agents.ego_description: navigating through busy intersections, stopping at traffic signals and following the flow of traffic through densely built neon-lit streets

notable_agents.action: purple sports car driving parallel in the left lane through the intersection

entered.detail: vertical traffic light showing red signal at the intersection
large cyan neon sign reading BELOW DECK mounted on a building facade
elevated walkway with stairs crossing above the street level
building with traditional Japanese-inspired roof design and red neon accents

segments.scene_description: The camera returns to a following view as the convertible navigates a busy downtown intersection, stopping at a red traffic light before turning right. The vehicle passes under a pedestrian overpass and continues through streets lined with dense neon signage, including a prominent cyan BELOW DECK sign. In the distance, a distinctive pagoda-style building with red neon accents rises among the modern skyscrapers as the car maintains speed through the wet streets.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sheltered confines of a concrete overpass into the expansive, neon-drenched heart of a futuristic downtown. It begins with a steady drive beneath a massive overpass, following a red sedan past green neon billboards and glass office towers on rain-slicked asphalt. As the vehicle exits the shelter, the scene opens into a wide boulevard where the gold convertible accelerates aggressively, drifting around a corner while the camera swings to a dramatic side view of towering skyscrapers and a distant suspension bridge. The perspective then returns to a following view as the car navigates a busy intersection and turns right under a pedestrian bridge, passing a cyan Below Deck sign. Finally, the journey continues through streets lined with dense signage, moving toward a distinctive red-accented pagoda building that rises among the modern skyline.
